name: Name

stationDetails.paymentDetailsHint: These details update automatically for the station you selected, so customers do not need to remember them.
stationDetails.paymentCopyHint: Tap Copy for the phone or account number, then paste it into your payment app.
stationDetails.paymentDetailsMissing: This station has not added manual payment details yet. You can still use the in-app checkout button.
stationDetails.copyFailedBody: We could not copy that value. Please copy it manually.
stationDetails.checkInDesc: Start check-in at station, then show OTP/QR to attendant.
stationDetails.noReports: No live reports for this station yet.
stationDetails.noReviews: No live reviews for this station yet.
stationDetails.invalidLitersBody: Enter a valid number of liters greater than 0.
stationDetails.stationIdMissingBody: This station does not have a valid backend stationId.
stationDetails.checkInMissingTicketBody: You need an active queue ticket before check-in.
stationDetails.locationRequiredBody: Enable location permission to start check-in.
stationDetails.paymentInitiated: Payment initiated. Complete payment in Telebirr, then status will update.
stationDetails.waitingPaymentConfirm: Waiting for payment confirmation. Tap Check Payment Status.
stationDetails.paymentVerified: Payment verified. Your queue ticket is now active.
stationDetails.completePaymentFirst: Complete a successful payment before generating the check-in QR or OTP.
stationDetails.startForQr: Start check-in to generate QR and OTP.
stationDetails.attendantNote: Attendant verification should be done in staff app only.
stationDetails.objectIdError: This station lacks a valid backend ObjectId. Update station data before queueing.
stationDetails.noFuelBody: This station is marked empty. Try another station.
stationDetails.limitedFuelBody: This station has limited fuel. Do you want to continue payment?
stationDetails.queueSavedOffline: Queue request saved offline. It will sync when you reconnect. Payment still needs internet.
stationDetails.leaveSavedOffline: Leave-queue request saved offline. It will sync when you reconnect.
stationDetails.emailRequired: Email is required for Chapa payment.
stationDetails.leaveDisabledNotice: Leave queue is disabled after payment for available stations.

twoFactorAuthSubtitle: Add extra security to your account
dataSaverSubtitle: Use less data on cellular networks
autoRefreshPricesSubtitle: Keep station prices up to date
clearCacheConfirm: This will clear cached data and reset preferences on this device.
deleteAccountConfirm: This action is permanent. Your account will be deleted.

login.title: Welcome Back
login.subtitle: Login to continue with FuelFinder
login.requiredError: Enter email or plate number and password.

register.requiredError: Name, phone, plate type, exactly 5 plate digits, and password are required.

auth.googleNotReady: Google sign-in is not ready yet.

promotions.title: Station promotions

location.denied: Location access denied. Showing stations only.

stations.loadFail: Failed to load nearby real fuel stations.

route.label: Route
route.needLocation: Current location is required to draw directions.
route.unavailable: Live road route unavailable right now. Please try again.
route.fail: Network routing failed. Could not load road path.

homeScreen.fastLineReason: Fast line and stable fuel availability
homeScreen.limitedReason: Fuel is limited, go soon if needed
